title: Whats Going On With Vlcc Rates
section_path: Whats Going On With Vlcc Rates
section_path_text: Whats Going On With Vlcc Rates
summary:
Main
By Panagiota Kinti
VLCC freight rates have surged to levels not seen in years, surprising many market participants and prompting fresh debate across the tanker market. What at first looked like an ordinary recovery has developed into a pronounced spike driven by a combination of supply tightness, geopolitical risk and structural market shifts. According to Breakwave Advisors, VLCC rates climbed sharply in late January and have remained near multi-year highs.
